calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Candace Wong, Plaintiff in pro per
Mary Rosalie Damante, Defendant in pro per

The cause comes on calendar this date for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Candace Wong testifies on her behalf. Declaration of Lu Fe Ng is submitted on behalf of respondent/plaintiff. Marsha Nichols testifies on behalf of plaintiff.

Mary Rosalie Damante testifies on her behalf. Candace Wong cross-examines Ms. Damante.
Marcy Metzgar testifies on behalf of defendant. Declaration of Erin Murphy Harp is submitted on behalf of defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

(Judge Tomar Mason, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported, Dept. 606)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-06-2008 Assigned To Trial Court
